CRM Evaluation Tool

About The Ops Shop

Operational expertise, without the overhead

The Ops Shop works with founders, MDs, and ops leads at recruitment agencies and professional services businesses across the UK — helping them build the systems and structure they need to grow without chaos.

These tools are a free starting point. If what you find raises questions, or you want a second opinion on what to do next, a call costs nothing.
